title: Navaris Paint Stirrer - Paint Mixer for Drill - Mixing Paddle - Heavy Duty Plaster Mixer for Standard Drills - Steel Drill Whisk Tool Resin Painting and Plastering
features: Paint Jobs: The Navaris Paint Mixing Paddle for Drill is an effective tool for mixing separated paint, adhesives, grouting, mortar, cement, mud and other liquids quickly and evenly. No need to use sticks, stirrers or poles for your mixing!

Easy to Use: The paint stirrer for drill has a hex shaped shaft and can be used on a standard power drill with a drill chuck from 6mm and higher. Please note that if you have a power drill with an SDS pod, you need an adapter (not included).
Details: Dimensions: 6 cm x 40 cm x 7.8 mm. Weight: approx. 200 grams. The drill mixer attachment is made of steel coated in red paint.
Easy to Clean: To clean the paint off the mixing paddle, insert it into a bucket of clean water and mix. Done!

Value for Money: The paint mixer attachment from Navaris offers you an affordable and very effective way to perfect your paint jobs and home improvement projects. Spend less time mixing paint and more time on your DIY construction projects.
description: Product Description Mixing rod for liquids: The next renovation is coming - this also likes to mean that new colour needs to be applied to the wall. No problem for the mixing attachment of the drill from Navaris! Spiral-shaped: As the paint whisk is spiral-shaped, paint, varnish, mortar and glazes are mixed even better and evenly. Technical data: Material: SteelDimensions: 6 x 40 cm, Pen: 6 mm. Weight: approx. 200 g Box contents: 1 x paint mixer About Navaris: Selected designs Various styles and attractive designs - the Navaris range offers you a comprehensive selection for all areas of life. Useful products The product world of Navaris is inspired by everyday life. As a brand, we offer clear and simple solutions for everyday situations to make your life a little easier. German standards In accordance with our strict standards, we develop and test the Navaris range from our Berlin location together with our global network of Expert:innen
